member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Client.Auth
member.summary: Client class for interaction with Auth endpoints of WP REST API

member.name: M:WordPressPCL.Client.Auth.#ctor(WordPressPCL.Utility.HttpHelper)
member.param: reference to HttpHelper class for interaction with HTTP

member.name: M:WordPressPCL.Client.Auth.UseBearerAuth(WordPressPCL.Models.JWTPlugin)
member.summary: Sets up the Auth Client to use Bearer Authentication with specified JWTPlugin
member.param: JWT Plugin to use for Bearer Authentication

member.name: M:WordPressPCL.Client.Auth.UseBasicAuth(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sets up the Auth Client to use Basic Authentication with Application Password

member.name: M:WordPressPCL.Client.Auth.Logout
member.summary: Forget the JWT Auth Token, won't invalidate it serverside though

member.name: M:WordPressPCL.Client.Auth.RemoveEmptyData(System.String)
member.summary: Removes an empty data field in a Json string, e.g. when checking validity of token

member.name: M:WordPressPCL.Client.Auth.GetToken
member.summary: Gets the JWToken from the client

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Client.CRUDOperation`2
member.summary: Base class for CRUDOperation with default implementation of all necessary operations

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Client.CRUDOperation`2.ForceDeletion
member.summary: Is object must be force deleted

member.name: M:WordPressPCL.Client.CRUDOperation`2.#ctor(WordPressPCL.Utility.HttpHelper,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.param: reference to HttpHelper class for interaction with HTTP
is objects must be force deleted

member.name: M:WordPressPCL.Client.CRUDOperation`2.GetPagedAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get a single page of results with pagination metadata.
member.returns: A containing the items for the requested page plus the X-WP-Total and X-WP-TotalPages metadata.

member.name: M:WordPressPCL.Client.CRUDOperation`2.QueryPagedAsync(`1,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute a parametrized query and return results with pagination metadata.
member.returns: A containing the matching items plus X-WP-Total and X-WP-TotalPages metadata.

member.name: M:WordPressPCL.Client.CRUDOperation`2.QueryAsync(`1,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create a parametrized query and get a result

member.param: HttpHelper class to operate with Http methods

member.param: request should prepend default path to route, defaults to true

member.name: M:WordPressPCL.Client.CustomRequest.DeleteAsync(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: request should prepend default path to route, defaults to true

member.param: request should prepend default path to route, defaults to true

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Models.AuthMethod
member.summary:
Authentication Methods
JWT - recommended AUTH method

member.name: F:WordPressPCL.Models.AuthMethod.Basic
member.summary: Basic Authentication using Application Passwords introduced in Wordpress 5.6

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Base.Id
member.remarks: Read only Context: view, edit, embed

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Category.Count
member.summary: Number of published posts for the term.

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Models.Comment
member.summary: Type represent Comment Entity of WP REST API

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Comment.PostId
member.summary: The id of the associated post object.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Comment.ParentId
member.summary: The id for the parent of the object.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Comment.AuthorId
member.summary: The id of the user object, if author was a user.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Comment.AuthorName
member.summary: Display name for the object author.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Comment.AuthorEmail
member.summary: Email address for the object author.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Comment.AuthorIP
member.summary: IP address for the object author.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Comment.AuthorAvatarUrls
member.summary: Avatar URLs for the object author.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Comment.AuthorUserAgent
member.summary: User agent for the object author.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Comment.Date
member.summary: The date the object was published.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Comment.DateGmt
member.summary: The date the object was published as GMT.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Comment.Type
member.summary: Type of Comment for the object.

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Models.CommentThreaded
member.summary: An extension class for Comment that holds a depth property for displaying threaded comments

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.CommentThreaded.Depth
member.summary: The depth of a comment 0 is a top level comments without parent

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Embedded.WpTerm
member.summary: Terms for the post (categories, tags etc.)

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Models.MediaQueryStatus
member.summary: Status of Media for query builder

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Models.PostsOrderBy
member.summary: Sort posts collection by object attribute.

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Models.UsersOrderBy
member.summary: Sort users collection by object attribute.

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Models.TermsOrderBy
member.summary: Sort terms collection by object attribute.

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Models.MediaOrderBy
member.summary: Sort posts collection by object attribute.

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Models.PagesOrderBy
member.summary: Sort pages collection by object attribute.

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Models.CommentsOrderBy
member.summary: Sort comments collection by object attribute.

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Models.Context
member.summary: Scope under which the request is made; determines fields present in response.
member.remarks: Default: view One of: view, embed, edit

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Models.Exceptions.WPUnexpectedException
member.summary: An exception resulting from a malformed WP response from a WP REST call, where the response is still a valid (but not successful) HTTP response. For example, the response returned from an endpoint that is not a WP REST endpoint

member.name: M:WordPressPCL.Models.Exceptions.WPUnexpectedException.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpResponseMessage,System.String)
member.summary: Construct a WPUnexpectedException from a response

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Exceptions.WPUnexpectedException.Response
member.summary: The response that triggered the error

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Exceptions.WPUnexpectedException.ResponseBody
member.summary: The response body (if any) that was returned with the error status

member.name: F:WordPressPCL.Models.JWTPlugin.JWTAuthByEnriqueChavez
member.summary: JWT Authentication for WP REST API plugin Author - Enrique Chavez

member.summary: JWT Auth – WordPress JSON Web Token Authentication plugin Author - Useful Team

member.summary: Response class for the JWT Plugin

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.JWTResponse.Success
member.summary: Indicates if the call was successful

member.summary: User class for working with the JWT plugin

member.summary: The JWT Token used to authorize requests

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Models.MediaItem
member.summary: Type represent Media Entity of WP REST API

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.MediaItem.Date
member.summary: The date the object was published, in the site’s timezone.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.MediaItem.DateGmt
member.summary: The date the object was published, as GMT.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.MediaItem.Guid
member.summary: The globally unique identifier for the object.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.MediaItem.Modified
member.summary: The date the object was last modified, in the site’s timezone.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.MediaItem.ModifiedGmt
member.summary: The date the object was last modified, as GMT.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.MediaItem.Slug
member.summary: An alphanumeric identifier for the object unique to its type.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.MediaItem.Status
member.summary: A named status for the object.
member.remarks: Context: edit One of: publish, future, draft, pending, private

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.MediaItem.Type
member.summary: Type of Post for the object.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.MediaItem.Author
member.summary: The id for the author of the object.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.MediaItem.CommentStatus
member.summary: Whether or not comments are open on the object.
member.remarks: Context: view, edit One of: open, closed

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.MediaItem.PingStatus
member.summary: Whether or not the object can be pinged.
member.remarks: Context: view, edit One of: open, closed

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.MediaItem.AltText
member.summary: Alternative text to display when resource is not displayed.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.MediaItem.MediaType
member.remarks: Context: view, edit, embed One of: image, file

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.MediaItem.MediaDetails
member.summary: Details about the resource file, specific to its type.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.MediaItem.Post
member.summary: The id for the associated post of the resource.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.MediaItem.SourceUrl
member.summary: URL to the original resource file.

member.summary: The id for the parent of the object.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Page.MenuOrder
member.summary: The order of the object in relation to other object of its type.

member.summary: Whether or not comments are open on the object.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Page.Template
member.summary: The theme file to use to display the object.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Page.Password
member.summary: A password to protect access to the content and excerpt.

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Models.PagedResult`1
member.summary: Represents a single page of results from a WordPress REST API list endpoint, carrying both the items and the pagination metadata extracted from the X-WP-Total and X-WP-TotalPages response headers.
member.typeparam: The item type returned by the endpoint.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.PagedResult`1.Items
member.summary: The items returned in this page.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.PagedResult`1.TotalCount
member.summary: Total number of items across all pages, as reported by the X-WP-Total response header.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.PagedResult`1.TotalPages
member.summary: Total number of pages available, as reported by the X-WP-TotalPages response header.

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Models.Plugin
member.summary: WordPress Plugins Date: 26 May 2023 Creator: Gregory Liénard

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Plugin.Id
member.summary: First part of the pluginfile: wordpress-seo/wp-seo => wordpress-seo Id is needed to install, PluginFile is needed to activate, deactivate, delete

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Plugin.NetworkOnly
member.summary: Whether the plugin can only be activated network-wide.

member.summary: Type represents Entity Post of WP REST API

member.summary: Whether or not the object should be treated as sticky.

member.remarks: Context: view, edit One of: standard

member.summary: The terms assigned to the object in the category taxonomy.

member.summary: The terms assigned to the object in the post_tag taxonomy.

member.summary: The theme file to use to display the object.

member.summary: The number of Liveblog Likes the post has.

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Models.PostStatus
member.summary: Type represents Post Status Entity of WP REST API

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.PostStatus.Private
member.summary: Whether posts with this resource should be private.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.PostStatus.Protected
member.summary: Whether posts with this resource should be protected.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.PostStatus.Public
member.summary: Whether posts with this resource should be public.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.PostStatus.Queryable
member.summary: Whether posts with this resource should be publicly-queryable.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.PostStatus.ShowInList
member.summary: Whether to include posts in the edit listing for their post type.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.PostStatus.Slug
member.summary: An alphanumeric identifier for the taxonomy.

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Models.PostType
member.summary: Type represents Post Type Entity of WP REST API

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.PostType.Capabilities
member.summary: All capabilities used by the taxonomy.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.PostType.Description
member.summary: A human-readable description of the taxonomy.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.PostType.Hierarchical
member.summary: Whether or not the taxonomy should have children.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.PostType.Labels
member.summary: Human-readable labels for the taxonomy for various contexts.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.PostType.Slug
member.summary: An alphanumeric identifier for the taxonomy.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.PostType.ShowCloud
member.summary: Whether or not the term cloud should be displayed.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.PostType.RestBase
member.summary: REST base route for the taxonomy.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Settings.Email
member.summary: This address is used for admin purposes. If you change this we will send you an email at your new address to confirm it. The new address will not become active until confirmed.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Settings.Timezone
member.summary: A city in the same timezone as you.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Settings.DateFormat
member.summary: A date format for all date strings.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Settings.TimeFormat
member.summary: A time format for all time strings.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Settings.StartOfWeek
member.summary: A day number of the week that the week should start on.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Settings.UseSmilies
member.summary: Convert emoticons like :-) and :-P to graphics on display.

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Models.RenderedRawBase
member.summary: Adds a "Rendered" and a "Raw" property to all classes derived from this one

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Models.RenderedArrayRawBase
member.summary: Adds a "Rendered" and a "Raw" property to all classes derived from this one

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Models.HrefBase
member.summary: Adds an Href property to all classes derived from this one

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Models.Content
member.summary: The actual content of the object, Rendered and/or Raw depending on the context

member.summary: Constructor with same fields for Raw end Rendered
member.param: Text for Raw and rendered Content

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Models.ThemeSupports
member.summary: Describes the features supported by the active theme.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.ThemeSupports.AlignWide
member.summary: Indicates whether the theme supports wide and full-width alignment options.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.ThemeSupports.AutomaticFeedLinks
member.summary: Indicates whether the theme supports automatic feed links.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.ThemeSupports.BlockTemplates
member.summary: Indicates whether the theme supports block templates.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.ThemeSupports.BlockTemplateParts
member.summary: Indicates whether the theme supports block template parts.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.ThemeSupports.CustomBackground
member.summary: Indicates whether the theme supports custom backgrounds.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.ThemeSupports.CustomHeader
member.summary: Indicates whether the theme supports custom headers.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.ThemeSupports.CustomLogo
member.summary: Indicates whether the theme supports custom logos.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.ThemeSupports.CustomizeSelectiveRefreshWidgets
member.summary: Indicates whether the theme supports selective refresh for widgets in the customizer.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.ThemeSupports.DarkEditorStyle
member.summary: Indicates whether the theme supports a dark editor style.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.ThemeSupports.DisableCustomColors
member.summary: Indicates whether the theme disables custom colors.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.ThemeSupports.DisableCustomFontSizes
member.summary: Indicates whether the theme disables custom font sizes.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.ThemeSupports.DisableCustomGradients
member.summary: Indicates whether the theme disables custom gradients.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.ThemeSupports.DisableLayoutStyles
member.summary: Indicates whether the theme disables layout styles.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.ThemeSupports.EditorColorPalette
member.summary: Indicates whether the theme provides an editor color palette.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.ThemeSupports.EditorFontSizes
member.summary: Indicates whether the theme provides editor font sizes.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.ThemeSupports.EditorGradientPresets
member.summary: Indicates whether the theme provides editor gradient presets.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.ThemeSupports.EditorStyles
member.summary: Indicates whether the theme provides editor styles.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.ThemeSupports.Html5
member.summary: Gets the supported HTML5 feature set.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.ThemeSupports.PostThumbnails
member.summary: Indicates whether the theme supports post thumbnails.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.ThemeSupports.ResponsiveEmbeds
member.summary: Indicates whether the theme supports responsive embeds.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.ThemeSupports.TitleTag
member.summary: Indicates whether the theme supports automatic document titles.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.ThemeSupports.WpBlockStyles
member.summary: Indicates whether the theme supports default block styles.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Tag.Count
member.summary: Number of published posts for the term.

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Models.Taxonomy
member.summary: Type represents Taxonomy Entity of WP REST API

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Taxonomy.Capabilities
member.summary: All capabilities used by the taxonomy.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Taxonomy.Description
member.summary: A human-readable description of the taxonomy.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Taxonomy.Hierarchical
member.summary: Whether or not the taxonomy should have children.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Taxonomy.Labels
member.summary: Human-readable labels for the taxonomy for various contexts.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Taxonomy.Slug
member.summary: An alphanumeric identifier for the taxonomy.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Taxonomy.ShowCloud
member.summary: Whether or not the term cloud should be displayed.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Taxonomy.RestBase
member.summary: REST base route for the taxonomy.

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Models.Term
member.summary: This is the base class for all terms, like categories and tags

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Term.Link
member.remarks: Read only Context: view, embed, edit

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Term.Slug
member.summary: An alphanumeric identifier for the term unique to its type.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Term.Taxonomy
member.remarks: Read only Context: view, embed, edit One of: category, post_tag, nav_menu, link_category, post_format

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Models.Theme
member.summary: WordPress Themes Date: 8 June 2023 Creator: Gregory Liénard

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Theme.Stylesheet
member.summary: The theme's stylesheet. This uniquely identifies the theme.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Theme.Template
member.summary: The theme's template. If this is a child theme, this refers to the parent theme.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Theme.AuthorUri
member.summary: The website of the theme author.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Theme.RequiresPhp
member.summary: The minimum PHP version required for the theme to work.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Theme.RequiresWp
member.summary: The minimum WordPress version required for the theme to work.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Theme.Tags
member.summary: Tags indicating styles and features of the theme.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Theme.ThemeUri
member.summary: The URI of the theme's webpage.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.Theme.Status
member.summary: A named status for the theme.

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Models.User
member.summary: Type represents Entity User of WP REST API

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Models.User.Email
member.summary: The email address for the user.

member.remarks: Read only Context: embed, view, edit

member.summary: An alphanumeric identifier for the user.

member.summary: All capabilities assigned to the user.

member.summary: Any extra capabilities assigned to the user.

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Utility.CategoriesQueryBuilder
member.summary: Category Query Builder class to construct queries with valid parameters

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CategoriesQueryBuilder.PerPage
member.summary: Maximum number of items to be returned in result set (1-100).

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CategoriesQueryBuilder.Search
member.summary: Limit results to those matching a string.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CategoriesQueryBuilder.Exclude
member.summary: Ensure result set excludes specific IDs.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CategoriesQueryBuilder.Include
member.summary: Limit result set to specific IDs.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CategoriesQueryBuilder.Offset
member.summary: Offset the result set by a specific number of items.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CategoriesQueryBuilder.OrderBy
member.remarks: Default: name One of: id, include, name, slug, term_group, description, count

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CategoriesQueryBuilder.Slugs
member.summary: Limit result set to users with a specific slug.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CategoriesQueryBuilder.HideEmpty
member.summary: Whether to hide terms not assigned to any posts.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CategoriesQueryBuilder.Post
member.summary: Limit result set to terms assigned to a specific post.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CategoriesQueryBuilder.Parent
member.summary: Limit result set to terms assigned to a specific parent.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CommentsQueryBuilder.PerPage
member.summary: Maximum number of items to be returned in result set (1-100).

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CommentsQueryBuilder.Search
member.summary: Limit results to those matching a string.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CommentsQueryBuilder.After
member.summary: Limit response to posts published after a given date

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CommentsQueryBuilder.Authors
member.summary: Limit result set to posts assigned to specific authors.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CommentsQueryBuilder.AuthorsExclude
member.summary: Ensure result set excludes posts assigned to specific authors.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CommentsQueryBuilder.AuthorEmail
member.summary: Limit result set to that from a specific author email. Requires authorization.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CommentsQueryBuilder.Before
member.summary: Limit response to posts published before a given date

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CommentsQueryBuilder.Exclude
member.summary: Ensure result set excludes specific IDs.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CommentsQueryBuilder.Include
member.summary: Limit result set to specific IDs.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CommentsQueryBuilder.Karma
member.summary: Limit result set to that of a particular comment karma. Requires authorization.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CommentsQueryBuilder.Offset
member.summary: Offset the result set by a specific number of items.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CommentsQueryBuilder.MenuOrder
member.summary: Limit result set to resources with a specific menu_order value.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CommentsQueryBuilder.OrderBy
member.remarks: Default: date_gmt One of: date, date_gmt, id, include, post, parent, type

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CommentsQueryBuilder.Parents
member.summary: Limit result set to those of particular parent ids.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CommentsQueryBuilder.ParentsExclude
member.summary: Limit result set to all items except those of a particular parent id.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CommentsQueryBuilder.Posts
member.summary: Limit result set to resources assigned to specific post ids.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CommentsQueryBuilder.Statuses
member.summary: Limit result set to posts assigned one or more statuses.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.CommentsQueryBuilder.Type
member.summary: Limit result set to comments assigned a specific type. Requires authorization.

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Utility.CustomCapabilitiesJsonConverter
member.summary:
Custom JSON converter for individual boolean capability values that may be represented as JSON booleans or as the string literals "0"/"1" in WordPress REST API responses.
Use when you need to deserialize an entire capabilities dictionary (i.e. on or ).

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Utility.CapabilitiesDictionaryConverter
member.summary: Custom JSON converter for IDictionary<string, bool> where each value may be a JSON boolean or the string literals "0"/"1". Apply this converter on the and properties.

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Utility.ExcludeQueryTextAttribute
member.summary: Attribute to exclude query text in querybuilder

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.ExcludeQueryTextAttribute.ExclusionValue
member.summary: Value which determines if query text is excluded

member.name: M:WordPressPCL.Utility.ExcludeQueryTextAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.param: value which determines if query text is excluded

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Utility.HttpHelper
member.summary: Helper class encapsulates common HTTP requests methods

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.HttpHelper.ApplicationPassword
member.summary: The Application Password to be used for authentication

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.HttpHelper.UserName
member.summary: The username to be used with the Application Password

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.HttpHelper.HttpResponsePreProcessing
member.summary: Function called when a HttpRequest response is read Executed before trying to convert json content to a TClass object.

member.name: M:WordPressPCL.Utility.HttpHelper.#ctor(System.Uri,System.String)
member.param: base WP REST API endpoint EX. http://demo.com/wp-json/

member.name: M:WordPressPCL.Utility.HttpHelper.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,System.String,System.Uri)
member.param: Http client which would be used for sending requests to the WordPress API endpoint.
Relative path to standard API endpoints, defaults to "wp/v2/"
(optional) Base WP REST API endpoint EX. http://demo.com/wp-json/. Use this if the BaseAddress of the httpClient is not set.

member.name: M:WordPressPCL.Utility.HttpHelper.GetRequestWithHeadersAsync``1(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Issues a GET request and returns both the deserialized response and the raw response headers. Use to extract X-WP-Total / X-WP-TotalPages values.

member.name: M:WordPressPCL.Utility.HttpHelper.ParsePaginationHeaders(System.Net.Http.Headers.HttpResponseHeaders)
member.summary: Parses the WordPress pagination headers from a response.
member.returns: A tuple of (total, totalPages) where total comes from X-WP-Total and totalPages comes from X-WP-TotalPages. Returns (0, 1) when the headers are absent.

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Utility.JsonStringEnumMemberConverter
member.summary: A that serializes and deserializes enum values using their when present, falling back to the lower-case member name otherwise.

member.summary: This method returns the comments sorted for a threaded view (oldest first) including the depth of a comment
member.param: list of comments which will be ordered

member.summary: Extension method: Get Threaded comments from ordinary comments
member.param: Newest comments should be shown first

member.name: M:WordPressPCL.Utility.UrlHelper.SetQueryParam(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new string with queryParam & queryValue appended as query parameters Ensures values are appended correctly with & or ?

member.summary: Creates a new string with queryParam & queryValue appended as query parameters Ensures values are appended correctly with & or ?

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.Utility.UsersQueryBuilder
member.summary: Users Query Builder class to construct queries with valid parameters

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.UsersQueryBuilder.PerPage
member.summary: Maximum number of items to be returned in result set (1-100).

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.UsersQueryBuilder.Search
member.summary: Limit results to those matching a string.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.UsersQueryBuilder.Exclude
member.summary: Ensure result set excludes specific IDs.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.UsersQueryBuilder.Include
member.summary: Limit result set to specific IDs.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.UsersQueryBuilder.Offset
member.summary: Offset the result set by a specific number of items.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.UsersQueryBuilder.OrderBy
member.remarks: Default: name One of: id, include, name, registered_date, slug, email, url

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.UsersQueryBuilder.Slugs
member.summary: Limit result set to users with a specific slug.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.Utility.UsersQueryBuilder.Roles
member.summary: Limit result set to users matching at least one specific role provided. Accepts csv list or single role.

member.name: T:WordPressPCL.WordPressClient
member.summary: Main class containing the wrapper client with all public API endpoints.

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.WordPressClient.WordPressUri
member.summary: WordPressUri holds the WordPress API endpoint, e.g. "http://demo.wp-api.org/wp-json/wp/v2/"

member.name: P:WordPressPCL.WordPressClient.HttpResponsePreProcessing
member.summary: Function called when a HttpRequest response to WordPress APIs are read Executed before trying to convert json content to a TClass object.

member.name: M:WordPressPCL.WordPressClient.#ctor(System.Uri,System.String)
member.summary: The WordPressClient holds all connection infos and provides methods to call WordPress APIs.
member.param: URI for WordPress API endpoint, e.g. "http://demo.wp-api.org/wp-json/"
Relative path to standard API endpoints, defaults to "wp/v2/"

member.name: M:WordPressPCL.WordPressClient.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: The WordPressClient holds all connection infos and provides methods to call WordPress APIs.
member.param: URI for WordPress API endpoint, e.g. "http://demo.wp-api.org/wp-json/"
Relative path to standard API endpoints, defaults to "wp/v2/"

member.name: M:WordPressPCL.WordPressClient.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,System.String,System.Uri)
member.summary: The WordPressClient holds all connection infos and provides methods to call WordPress APIs.
member.param: HttpClient with BaseAddress set which will be used for sending requests to the WordPress API endpoint.
Relative path to standard API endpoints, defaults to "wp/v2/"
URI for WordPress API endpoint, e.g. "http://demo.wp-api.org/wp-json/". Use this if the BaseAddress of the httpClient is not set.
